Title: Support picker portals

As a operator
I want dropdowns to render above clipped cards and panels
So that menus remain usable in dense layouts

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] People card pickers can open without being clipped by parent containers.
- [ ] Popover/dropdown positioning follows the trigger.
- [ ] Closing the dropdown restores focus/interaction without layout jumps.

Notes: Backdated from portal dropdown and pill style fixes.
